title: 10 best herbal teas for bloating
description: Sage teas helps with bloating because it contains compounds that aid digestion and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). The anti-inflammatory properties of sage tea reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which can contribute to bloating. Additionally, the carnosic acid present in sage tea has been shown to slow gastric emptying, allowing for better nutrient absorption and reducing feelings of discomfort.
